title: Delete item on board and deletes on connected boards
excerpt: Hello my Monday friends! Is there a way to delete an item form all connected boards when deleted from primary board?

posts.author: KCordaro (KCORD)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello my Monday friends! Is there a way to delete an item form all connected boards when deleted from primary board?

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Do you mean delete the connected items, or delete the connections to the item being deleted?

Each board has a unique item, they may be connected though.

posts.author: KCordaro (KCORD)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes delete an item and delete the same item on all connected boards.

Board 1 - “Item A”
Boards 2,3 4 - “Item A”

Delete Item A from Board 1 and it’s automatically deleted from Boards 2,3,4

Thanks for your help!

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @KCordaro, @anon29275264

We’ve developed an app called Connected Boards Automations. Which allows to run robust automations on connected boards column, here’s how it can be used in this case →

Delete the connected item when the primary item is deleted →

Screenshot 2024-10-11 at 15.24.112184×408 19.3 KB

Delete the connected item when the primary item moves group →

Screenshot 2024-10-11 at 15.24.402212×320 19.8 KB

It’s also worth mentioning that is supports -

  1. Automatically connecting items based on conditions and flexible logic.
  2. Automatically removing connecting.
  3. Syncing values between connected items.
  4. Cross-board automations (trigger in the connected board and action in the current board)

You can find it in the monday.com app marketplace in the platform or here - https://monday.com/marketplace/listing/10000321/connected-boards-automations-

Hope that helps!
